no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The current repository snapshot already lacks the named dead-code targets from the bead description. `cli/internal/agent/format.go` and `cli/internal/agent/grade.go` are not present in the tree, and `rg -n "FormatComparisonTable|FormatGradeTable|buildGradingPrompt|AppendBurnSummary|parseWindowMinutes|WriteModelCatalogYAML|harnessHealthyViaService|loadExecutionsMirrorConfig" .` returns no source matches outside docs/testdata. The remaining live files in scope are `cli/internal/agent/routing_metrics.go` and `cli/internal/agent/model_catalog_yaml.go`, but they do not define the deleted functions named in the bead. `go build ./...` completes, but `go test ./...` still fails in unrelated `cli/cmd` installation acceptance tests because `cli/build/ddx` is an ar archive, so the suite cannot execute the expected binary. There is no additional source deletion to make in this snapshot without changing build plumbing outside the bead scope.
